_comment: DJR Photography galleries. Each gallery can link to either a Photo Gallery App album (album.html?album=<ID>) or a Google Photos shared album URL. Photo Gallery App albums can auto-load their cover; Google Photos entries should include a cover image. Edit via Decap CMS -> DJR Photography -> Galleries.

meta.title: Galleries | DJR Photography
meta.description: Browse DJR Photography galleries - story, portrait, sports, creative, and event photography.

hero.title: Galleries
hero.intro: Browse David's work by story category. Each card can open the full Photo Gallery App viewer or a shared Google Photos album.

emptyMessage: Galleries are being curated - check back soon.
